shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch sitting on a plane with a No Connection screen, calmly contemplating the offline trade-off.
assets.caption: Notion's offline mode — what the constraint cost and what it protected.
assets.prompt: Notion — No Offline Mode | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) sitting cross-legged on an airplane seat, looking at a laptop showing "No connection" with a calm expression — not frustrated, just aware of the constraint. The scene is wry, not dramatic. Cream background. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing at two overlapping circles representing real-time collaboration and offline editing as partially incompatible goals.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing at two overlapping circles representing real-time collaboration and offline editing as partially incompatible goals.
assets.prompt: Notion — No Offline Mode | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing at two overlapping circles: one labeled "Real-time collaboration" and one labeled "Offline editing." The overlap region is small and labeled "Very hard." The scene communicates the architectural tension between the two goals. Cream background, no speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch examining two architectural diagrams — server-authoritative sync versus local-first sync — showing the complexity difference.
assets.caption: Hatch examining two architectural diagrams — server-authoritative sync versus local-first sync — showing the complexity difference.
assets.prompt: Notion — No Offline Mode | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose looking at a diagram showing: user edit → network → server → confirmation → reflected back. The diagram shows where the connection requirement enters the loop. Below it, a second diagram shows a local-first model with a sync layer, marked as significantly more complex. Cream background. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
